title: Korthalsella remyi
taxonomy: Korthalsella remyi is a species of plant in the family Santalaceae. It belongs to the genus Korthalsella and is classified as an epiphytic plant. The Santalaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as sandalwoods. Korthalsella remyi is native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. Its classification is further supported by its unique leaf structure and parasitic growth habit.
